name: cxtms-control-tower-os
description: Predictive logistics control tower and partner portal demo built for CXTMS.

scripts.build: npm --workspace shared run build && npm --workspace apps/control-tower-web run build && npm --workspace services/control-tower-api run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace shared run typecheck && npm --workspace apps/control-tower-web run typecheck && npm --workspace services/control-tower-api run typecheck
